economic_notes: Nation has investments in multiple controlled entities including Dunne-za Ventures LP, Black Diamond Cygnus LP, West Moberly First Nations Investments Inc., WM Indigiinet Internet Service Inc., Six Nations Ventures, Twin Sisters Native Plants Nursery LP, and Papawewin Developments LP. COVID-19 noted as significant event impacting operations.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Three entities consolidated using consolidation method: West Moberly First Nation Holdings Inc., 09244996 B.C. Ltd., and West Moberly First Nations Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust. Nine entities accounted for using modified equity method. Total expenditures from Schedule 4 ($12,755,773) includes amortization; program expenditures from Schedule 3 total $12,124,014 excluding amortization. Treaty loan payable to ISC of $3,278,585 is interest-free and due March 31, 2022 or upon claim settlement — not included in long_term_debt figure which reflects Note 11 only. annual_debt_service calculated as long-term liabilities repaid ($425,604) plus capital lease repaid ($31,015) = $456,619. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($3,507,208), FNHA ($681,316), CMHC ($174,093), Province of BC ($2,826,786), Environment Canada ($1,200,000) = $8,389,403; Treaty 8 Heritage Trust ($300,000) and Oil and Gas Commission ($649,925) added if considered government = $9,339,328; used ISC+FNHA+CMHC+BC+Environment Canada only for conservative government transfers. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. COVID-19 noted as significant event.
